component.name: SignalPatch
component.summary: Real-time modular guitar, voice and synth rack

description.p: SignalPatch is a patchable rack of audio modules that runs on your audio interface with minimal latency. Chain guitar effects, run real Neural Amp Modeler profiles, vocode and autotune your voice, sequence a synth and a drum machine, record onto a virtual 4-track — all by dragging cables between modules while the audio keeps running.

Every cable shows its live signal. Every module has a true-bypass stomp switch. Feedback loops are first-class citizens, protected by a dedicated guard stage. Patches save as JSON and the last session is restored on launch.

screenshot.caption: A patch running: Neural Amp, granular cloud, sequenced synth and drum machine

description.p: First public release: 35 modules, Neural Amp Modeler support, rack UI with stomp bypass and live cables, guarded feedback, autosave recovery.
